name: Veal Scallopine
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil and half the butter in a skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Coat the thinly-sliced veal in flour and brown both sides in the hot skillet.
3. Transfer the veal to a warm platter and season with salt and pepper.
4. Remove the skillet from the heat.
5. Add the lemon juice, capers, parsley flakes, and remaining butter to the skillet.
6. Stir until the sauce is heated through.
7. Pour the sauce over the veal on the warm platter.
8. Garnish with lemon slices and serve.
